O

offset - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.Timestamp
 
onCancel(String) - Method in interface com.hp.workpath.api.ILetObserver
Called to notify the client that the job associated with resourceId was canceled by a user or a program.
onCancel(String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
Called to notify the client when job is canceled completely.
onChange(JSONObject) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.config.ConfigService.AbstractConfigChangeObserver
Called to notify the client that the configuration data associated with application is changed.
onChange(DeviceEvent) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.device.events.DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver
Called to notify the client that a printer has event.
onChange() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.MassStorageService.AbstractMassStorageChangeObserver
Called to notify the client that massstorage state is changed.
onChange(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.StatisticsService.AbstractStatisticsNotificationObserver
Deprecated.
API 8 "No longer in use, please use StatisticsService.AbstractStatisticsNotificationObserver.onComplete(int) instead."
onComplete(String, JobInfo) - Method in interface com.hp.workpath.api.ILetObserver
Called to notify the client that the job completed successfully.
onComplete(String, JobInfo) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
Called to notify the client when a job is completed successfully for getting details
onComplete(int) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.StatisticsService.AbstractStatisticsNotificationObserver
Called to notify the client that a printer has event.
onContextChange(AccessoryInfo, EventCode, String, String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver
Called when context for registered accessory is changed.
onFail(String, Result) - Method in interface com.hp.workpath.api.ILetObserver
Called to notify the client that the job failed to complete successfully.
onFail(String, Result) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
Called to notify the client with reason and detail when job is finished with error.
onPrePrompt() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AbstractAuthenticationService
Called to notify the client that prePrompt action is required to proceed the authentication.
onProgress(String, JobInfo) - Method in interface com.hp.workpath.api.ILetObserver
Called multiple times to notify the client that the job has been in progress depending on the nature of the job status.
onProgress(String, JobInfo) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
Called to notify the client when the state of a job in progressing for monitoring the change of job state
onReady(AccessoryInfo, EventCode, String, String) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryStartObserver
Called when registered "owned" accessory is ready.
onReceive(AccessoryInfo, ReportEventInfo) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver
Called when the data for registered accessory is updated.
onSignIn(Principal) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AbstractAuthenticationService
Called to notify the client that device has been authenticated successfully with user information.
onSignOut() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AbstractAuthenticationService
Called to notify the client that SignOut operation is finished completely by a user request or authenticated user session is expired by timeout.
onStart() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.AbstractAccessoryService
Called to notify the client that accessory service started successfully.
onStart() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.webservices.AbstractWebServices
This method is called to notify the client that web service started successfully.
opaqueAuthenticationToken - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.UserAuthorizationData
 
open(Context, String, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService
Requests to open accessory with accessory context id.
openInputStream(Context, CustomerDataFile) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFileUtils
Returns an InputStream representing the data and throws the appropriate exception if it can not do so.
openOutputStream(Context, CustomerDataFile) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFileUtils
Returns an OutputStream where the data can be written and throws the appropriate exception if it can not do so.
OtherBuilder() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder
Default constructor to create a new Other Builder.
